title: coreopsis longula
intro: Coreopsis longula, also known as the tickseed or long-tipped tickseed, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its unique compounds like flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Coreopsis longula are said to include reducing inflammation, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
